g.text: DOC-BOT System Design, Architecture, and Workflows
Workflow note: cache hits short-circuit to citation formatting; vague prompts loop through clarification; low evidence routes to an honest fallback instead of unsupported generation.
3. Supabase Postgres + Upstash Redis + Qdrant Cloud
6. run ingest_qdrant_cloud.py locally to populate Qdrant Cloud
Production selection: the backend uses Qdrant Cloud when QDRANT_CLIENT_API_ENDPOINT and QDRANT_CLIENT_API_KEY are set; otherwise
it falls back to local Qdrant host/port.
